review: When I see you again, it will be like seeing the most beautiful sunrise and the brightest star on the clearest night. When I see you again, my heart will be filled with love as It was the day you left, never missing a beat growing stronger every passing day. When I see you again, time will have seemed to stop, thinking only of the future and what it holds. When I see you again, it can't come soon enough for it seems like forever. When I see you again, I will spend the rest of my life making you happier than you've ever been, so I never have to not see you again!Check my EKG

I closed on a property in Sept of 2022. I just received notice from the government that Whatcom Land Title did not accurately pay taxes that were due and I now owe the unpaid amount plus additional charges of penalties and interest. When asked about this, Whatcom told me they calculated the amount due incorrectly. However, this is not accurate. Whatcom Land Title uses an outside accounting firm who handled these calculations for them, had me sign a form stating said calculations, and they were simply to send a check with the form. How did the check amount not match the amount needed to be mailed then? When I contacted them about this, they provided the inaccurate data to me and sent a certified standard mail payment to the government during holiday time with only a week to pay the amount due. I asked them if they sent it priority or standard mailing and they said standard. I waited a week to see if the payment would be received timely and it was not and still hasn't been received, nor processed. They did not secure priority mailing to remedy the issue and nip any further stressful issues or correspondence for me in the bud after creating this entire situation by their own error that is still unexplained, and they simply did what suited them, my concerns or stress be damned. And, I will be following up with the State of Washington, as this issue remains unresolved. There is a choice of title company to use in this area and others. I would not use this company again. In my experience, they didn't care about my experience, but only themselves. They saved approximately $5 to $7 on the priority mailing which only added monumental additional stress to me. Super hard pass for these unconcerned folks and be sure to choose your title company wisely. It actually really matters. My realtor recommended them and I have shared my experience with the realtor and will be sure to tell others as well. Please pass it on.
Always good deal and high quality. Outdoors and garden. Like to do shopping here.

We were in town visiting while our new house closed in Florida. They were very helpful in our tight schedule to get us in and take care of the pkg getting sent back. There was a fee of $175 but well worth it.
Just brought my cashiers check for down payment on my retirement condo. No hitches just pleasant reception.

Great, quick, pleasant, streamline, informative experience. No complaints here. Easy to work with and extremely accomodating. We had tons of extra questions...all addressed with no problem. Very thorough!

Closed a couple of real estate transactions with them with no problems whatsoever. I can not say the same for a company from the windy city who failed miserably for me in the past. WLT is my go to title company.

I am out of state and needed some guidance on how to proceed with a title transfer or purchase of a property in Bellingham. I had no previous relationship with this company but blindly called to hire representation. I was given all the information I needed, and was sent helpful documents to get the work done without ever being charged. I could easily have been charged unnecessarily but I was treated like a long term customer. I highly recommend the honest people at Whatcom Land Title Co. Sergey Basantsev in particular. Thank you.
